news.t: PGIM Launches Two New Securitized Credit ETFs, Including a AAA-Rated CLO ETF With Core-Like Duration Exposure

overview.description: The PGIM AAA CLO Aggregate Duration ETF (AAAD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that primarily invests in AAA-rated collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) while using a duration overlay to align interest rate sensitivity more closely with the broad US bond market. The fund seeks total return through a combination of income and capital appreciation. AAAD was launched on Jun 1, 2026 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: PGIM Launches Two New Securitized Credit ETFs, Including a AAA-Rated CLO ETF With Core-Like Duration Exposure
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Both AAAD and PINC seek to maximize total return through a combination of current income and capital appreciation.
